channel.title: Values on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Values on Aman Ahuja

item.title: On Manifestos
item.description:
Fenris recently published a Manifesto. You can read it here: gofenris.com/notes/manifesto

G challenged me to write a manifesto, a long time back. I had been wondering how to tell people about the work that I do, and he pushed back. Worry less about a portfolio, he said, and instead say provocative things, such that people want to reach out to you. He had been talking about a personal manifesto, not one for Fenris, but the idea got a foothold.

item.title: Wall of Thanks
item.description:
In a conversation with Louis Potok in 2021, Louis suggested including a Wall of Thanks to this website. What a great idea!

I looked at several sites for inspiration, starting with the WattTime team’s Wall of Fame (since removed). Each had their own take on the Wall, their own ideas of who to include and why.

But when I sat down to write, it felt like a terrible idea! Why would I volunteer to give what equates to a bad acceptance speech for a not-award? No one cares, it will surely be way too long, and inevitably someone will feel left out.
